case_results.assistant_message: Thanks for sharing those details. Your refund for ORD-1001 is approved. Order ORD-1001 is delivered, within the 30-day window, not final sale, and below the $500 escalation threshold.
Thanks for sharing those details. I cannot approve the refund for ORD-1002. The item was sold as final sale. Triggered policy: R2_FINAL_SALE.

Thanks for sharing those details. I cannot automatically approve ORD-1003; this case has been escalated for human review. The order value is $720.00, which is above the $500 automatic-refund limit. Triggered policy: R4_ESCALATE_OVER_500.
